contato.contato-text: Liked what you saw? Reach out to me through one of these channels!

skills.title: Skills
skills.text: Take a look at some of my skills and technologies

about.description: I am a Full Stack Developer focused on Python, building end-to-end solutions and integrating frontends with high-quality APIs. I work with strong attention to security and quality across all stages of the software development lifecycle, from design and testing to delivery, maintenance, and continuous improvement. My goal is to analyze processes, redesign them when necessary, and propose improvements through digital integrations that generate value and results.

experienciaProfissional.descricao: I currently lead the production team, being responsible for managing and prioritizing demands based on the needs of our Installation Centers. In addition to coordination activities, I also contribute technically by developing and configuring solutions for fatigue monitoring cameras integrated with artificial intelligence, aimed at improving operational safety. I also develop Python automations to optimize internal processes and recurring daily tasks, increasing efficiency and reducing manual work.

experienciaAcademica.titulo: Lecture: Programming Immersion at Leopoldo de Miranda State School
experienciaAcademica.descricao: I was responsible for planning and delivering an immersive lecture about the fundamentals of programming to high school students, using practical and inspiring examples. The goal was to spark interest in the technology field.

I designed, built, and programmed an autonomous robot capable of moving using HC-SR04 sound sensors. The project involved integrating sensors, a microcontroller (Arduino), DC motors, and developing control algorithms using PID in C++.
